title: Faced With Heat and Wildfires, France Turns to Spain to Learn How to Cope
summary_full: A French government delegation will travel to its southern neighbor to learn how it copes with long spells of hot weather.
summary_public: A French government delegation will travel to its southern neighbor to learn how it copes with long spells of hot weather.
